label: 掩码交集
description: 对两个等尺寸网格求交集：同一点位两个网格均为非零值时输出1，否则输出0。尺寸策略：要求两网格尺寸完全相同，否则返回错误（与「掩码差集」mask_subtract 不同，后者允许尺寸不一并按左下角对齐）。
description-en: Computes the intersection of two same-size grids: outputs 1 where both grids have non-zero values, and 0 elsewhere. Size policy: the two grids MUST have identical dimensions, otherwise an error is returned (unlike Subtract (mask_subtract), which tolerates differing sizes by aligning to the bottom-left corner).
icon: 扁平插画风格小图标。两个半透明色块圆形交叠，交叠区域高亮为亮橙色，左圆蓝色，右圆绿色，背景浅灰，突出交集概念。主色3种，简洁现代。

inputs.name: inputGrid1
inputs.label: 网格1
inputs.description: 第一个输入网格，非零值视为有效区域
inputs.description-en: First input grid; non-zero values are treated as valid regions.

inputs.name: inputGrid2
inputs.label: 网格2
inputs.description: 第二个输入网格，非零值视为有效区域；与网格1按 lacing 逐分支配对
inputs.description-en: Second input grid; non-zero values are treated as valid regions. Paired branch-by-branch with grid1 via lacing.

outputs.name: outputGrid
outputs.label: 交集网格
outputs.description: 两网格的交集：均非零处为1，否则为0
outputs.description-en: Intersection of the two grids: 1 where both are non-zero, 0 otherwise.
